query: Analyze this threat report and map the behavior to MITRE ATT&CK techniques.
report_text: The attacker executed encoded PowerShell commands and used Invoke-WebRequest to download a payload from a remote server.

query: Identify likely ATT&CK techniques in this incident summary.
report_text: The malware ran cmd.exe, listed directories, and collected host information using systeminfo and whoami.

query: Map the described behavior to ATT&CK techniques.
report_text: The adversary used wmic for remote command execution and later attempted to dump LSASS memory to obtain credentials.
